texto: As if all that weren't enough, factor in the whole tedious millenial saga of female virtue, modesty, shame, repression, male ineptitude...in short, a cruel combo of anatomical inheritance and sexual inhibition for the gal set; a nature-culture one-two punch, right to the female pleasure principle.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Laura Kipnis: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “As if all that weren't enough, factor in the whole tedious millenial saga of female virtue, modes…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, sex, female pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
